videos.title: Copilot Cowork Is Finally GA (Big Changes)
videos.description:
Copilot Cowork is finally Generally Available, and Microsoft made some big changes along the way.

In this video, you'll get a practical walkthrough of what changed, why it matters, and what it means for your organization.

We'll cover:
✅ What General Availability means for the future of Cowork
✅ Why Cowork is one of the most exciting AI tools Microsoft has released
✅ New licensing requirements and Copilot Credit consumption
✅ Admin controls, governance, and policy management
✅ New model options

videos.title: NEW Copilot Studio Agents: Working with SharePoint Lists & Work IQ 🚀
videos.description:
Microsoft has completely redesigned the Copilot Studio agent experience, and in this video I put the new agents to work with SharePoint Lists and SharePoint Work IQ.

We'll build an AI-powered agent that connects to a large SharePoint List as a knowledge source and explore how the new agent experience can reason over data, generate business artifacts, and take actions on your behalf.

🚀 In this video you'll learn how to:

✅ Connect SharePoint Lists as a knowledge source
✅ Query large datasets us

videos.title: The 5-Minute AI Weekly Recap: Realignment Week
videos.description:
This week, the Fable fallout became a broader realignment across AI, pushing more attention toward open models, model routing, local control, and the risks of building around any single frontier system. GLM 5.2, OpenRouter’s Fusion, SpaceX’s Cursor acquisition, and Europe’s AI sovereignty scramble all point to the same shift: the model ecosystem is getting more fragmented, more strategic, and more contested.

Register for our new enterprise-grade AI training programs: ⁠⁠http://training.besuper.a
